image.name: overlay-art
image.path: startswith(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'final fantasy vii ') || startswith(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'final fantasy 7') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Final Fantasy.png' : '' || startswith(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'final fantasy vi ') || startswith(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'final fantasy 6 ') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Final Fantasy VI.png' : '' || startswith(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'final fantasy viii') || startswith(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'final fantasy 8') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Final Fantasy VIII.png' : '' || startswith(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'final fantasy ix') || startswith(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'final fantasy 9') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Final Fantasy IX.png' : '' || startswith(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'final fantasy x ') || startswith(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'final fantasy 10 ') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Final Fantasy X.png' : '' || startswith(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'final fantasy xiii ') || startswith(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'final fantasy 13 ') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Final Fantasy XIII.png' : ''

image.name: overlay-art1
image.path: contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'nights into dreams') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Nights into dreams.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'ghost of tsushima') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Ghost of Tsushima.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'dragon ball') || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'dragonball') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Dragon Ball.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'mario ') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Mario.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'pac-man') || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'pacman') || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'pac-land') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Mortal Kombat.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'navy moves') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Navy Moves.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'mega man') || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'rockman') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Mega Man.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'metal slug') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Metal Slug.png' : '' || (contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'super ghouls') || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'makaimura') || ( contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'ghosts') && ( contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'goblins') || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'ghouls') ) ) ) ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Ghosts Goblins.png' : ''

image.name: overlay-art2
image.path: contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'last of us') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Last of Us.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name}), 'zelda') && !contains(lower({game:name}), 'ocarina') && !contains(lower({game:name}), 'breath') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Zelda.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name}), 'zelda') && contains(lower({game:name}), 'ocarina') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Zelda Ocarina.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name}), 'zelda') && contains(lower({game:name}), 'breath') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/systems/wiiu.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'rayman') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Rayman.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'spider-man') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Spider-Man.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'x-men') || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'x men') || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'xmen') || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'children of the atom') || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'mutant apocalypse') || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'mutant academy') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Street Fighter.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name}), 'sonic the hedgehog') || !contains(lower({game:name}), 'boom') && !contains(lower({game:name}), 'knuckles') && contains(lower({game:name}), 'sonic') && contains(lower({game:publisher}), 'sega') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Sonic the Hedgehog.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name}), 'knuckles') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Knuckles.png' : ''

'${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Streets of Rage.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'silent hill') || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'silenthill') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Silent Hill.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'robotnik') || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'eggman') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Robotnik.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'final fight') && !contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'street fighter') && !contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'turrican') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Final fight.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'fatal fury') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Fatal Fury.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'banjo') && ( contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'kazooie') || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'tooie') ) ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Banjo Kazooie.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'kishin douji') || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'zenki') || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'vajra fight') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Vajra Fight.png' : ''

image.name: overlay-art15
image.path: contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'hollow knight') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Hollow Knight.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'ranma') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Ranma.png' : '' || contains(lower(' ' + {game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom} + ' '), ' aleste ') || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'musha') || contains(lower(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom})), 'power strike') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Aleste.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'penguin') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Pentaro.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'valorant') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Valorant.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'kimetsu no yaiba') || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'demon slayer') || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'kimetsu') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Kimetsu.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'gravity rush') || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'gravity daze') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Gravity Rush.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'chrono trigger') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Chrono Trigger.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'spyro') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Spyro.png' : '' || contains(lower({game:name} + ' ' + {game:rom}), 'parasite eve') ? '${themePath}/${theme.overlayArtsPath}/Parasite Eve.png' : ''

image.name: overlay-art, overlay-art1, overlay-art2, overlay-art3, overlay-art4, overlay-art5, overlay-art6, overlay-art7, overlay-art8, overlay-art9, overlay-art10, overlay-art11, overlay-art12, overlay-art13, overlay-art14, overlay-art15
